mapper.sql: select id, site_id, name, platform_type, api_endpoint, api_key, api_secret, model_name, available_models, category_id, config, max_tokens, temperature, rate_limit, cost_per_1k_tokens, is_default, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from gb_ai_platforms

if.test: queryMode != null and queryMode == 'related' and siteId != null

mapper.insert:
insert into gb_ai_platforms
site_id, name, platform_type, api_endpoint, api_key, api_secret, model_name, available_models, category_id, config, max_tokens, temperature, rate_limit, cost_per_1k_tokens, is_default, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark,
#{siteId}, #{name}, #{platformType}, #{baseUrl}, #{apiKey}, #{organizationId}, #{defaultModel}, #{availableModels}, #{categoryId}, #{proxyConfig}, #{maxTokens}, #{temperature}, #{rateLimitPerMinute}, #{costPer1kTokens}, #{isDefault}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark},
mapper.update: update gb_ai_platforms set del_flag = '2' where id = #{id}

update gb_ai_platforms set del_flag = '2' where id in
#{id}
